gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/120)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/120)
text: إِذَا أُهْدِيَ إِلَى الرَّجُلِ هَدِيَّةُ طَعَامٍ وَ عِنْدَهُ قَوْمٌ فَهُمْ شُرَكَاؤُهُ فِيهَا الْفَاكِهَةُ وَ غَيْرُهَا .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, raising it,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When a gift of food is gifted to the man, and in his presence is a group, so they are his participants in it, the fruits and other such items’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from certain persons of his people from Aban from Ibrahim ibn ‘Umar from Muhammad ibn Muslim in a Maqtu’ manner who have said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘People in the meeting with the recipient of a gift all have a share in that gift.’”
